restaurant_openings.name: Las Vegas Wins Its First James Beard Best Chef Award in 15 Years
restaurant_openings.summary: On June 15, 2026, Las Vegas was recognized with its first James Beard Foundation Best Chef award in almost two decades. Casa Playa chef Sarah Thompson took home the 2026 James Beard Awards Best Chef: Southwest. It’s a massive win for the celebrated chef, her restaurant, and for the City of Las Vegas; the last […]

restaurant_openings.name: At Maroon, Kwame Onwuachi Takes an Afro-Caribbean Lens to the Classic Steakhouse
restaurant_openings.summary: Chef Kwame Onwuachi — the James Beard Award–winning chef behind New York’s Tatiana and Washington, D.C.’s Dōgon — made his Las Vegas debut with a new Caribbean steakhouse in the Sahara. At Maroon, which opened in late April, Onwuachi takes an Afro-Caribbean lens to the classic steakhouse, reimagining it with flavors and techniques from Jamaica […]
